rules.rule_text:
rule MAL_JS_NPM_SupplyChain_Attack_Nov25
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects malicious JavaScript worm bun_environment.js"
		author = "Marius Benthin"
		date = "2025-11-24"
		modified = "2025-12-15"
		reference = "https://www.aikido.dev/blog/shai-hulud-strikes-again-hitting-zapier-ensdomains"
		hash = "62ee164b9b306250c1172583f138c9614139264f889fa99614903c12755468d0"
		score = 80

	strings:
		$sa1 = "npm publish"
		$sa2 = "NPM_TOKEN"
		$sa3 = "NPM_CONFIG_TOKEN"
		$sb1 = "GITHUB_"
		$sb2 = "GITLAB_"
		$sb3 = "TEAMCITY_"

	condition:
		filesize < 20MB and all of ( $sa* ) and 2 of ( $sb* )
}

rule_metadata.name: SUSP_JS_NPM_Sha1_Hulud_Nov25
rule_metadata.description: Detects suspicious indicators for Sha1 Hulud worm
rule_metadata.author: Marius Benthin

rules.rule_text:
rule SUSP_JS_NPM_Sha1_Hulud_Nov25
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects suspicious indicators for Sha1 Hulud worm"
		author = "Marius Benthin"
		date = "2025-11-24"
		modified = "2025-12-15"
		reference = "https://www.aikido.dev/blog/shai-hulud-strikes-again-hitting-zapier-ensdomains"
		hash = "62ee164b9b306250c1172583f138c9614139264f889fa99614903c12755468d0"
		score = 70

	strings:
		$x1 = "Sha1-Hulud:\\x"
		$x2 = "SHA1HULUD\"`"

	condition:
		filesize < 20MB and 1 of them
}

rule_metadata.name: SUSP_JS_NPM_SetupScript_Nov25
rule_metadata.description: Detects suspicious JavaScript which exits silently and checks operating system
rule_metadata.author: Marius Benthin

rules.rule_text:
rule SUSP_JS_NPM_SetupScript_Nov25
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects suspicious JavaScript which exits silently and checks operating system"
		author = "Marius Benthin"
		date = "2025-11-24"
		modified = "2025-12-15"
		reference = "https://www.aikido.dev/blog/shai-hulud-strikes-again-hitting-zapier-ensdomains"
		hash = "a3894003ad1d293ba96d77881ccd2071446dc3f65f434669b49b3da92421901a"
		score = 70

	strings:
		$sa1 = "require('child_process')"
		$sa2 = "process.platform ==="
		$sb1 = "().catch((e"
		$sb2 = "process.exit(0)"

	condition:
		filesize < 100KB and all of ( $sa* ) and $sb1 in ( filesize - 50 .. filesize ) and $sb2 in ( filesize - 30 .. filesize )
}

rule_metadata.name: MAL_NPM_SupplyChain_Attack_PreInstallScript_Nov25
rule_metadata.description: Detects known malicious preinstall script in package.json
rule_metadata.author: Marius Benthin

rules.rule_text:
rule MAL_NPM_SupplyChain_Attack_PreInstallScript_Nov25
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects known malicious preinstall script in package.json"
		author = "Marius Benthin"
		date = "2025-11-24"
		reference = "https://www.aikido.dev/blog/shai-hulud-strikes-again-hitting-zapier-ensdomains"
		hash = "c4bc2afd133916f064f2fb7d1e2e067ea65db33463eeae2fa54a9860a6303865"
		score = 80

	strings:
		$x1 = "\"preinstall\": \"node setup_bun.js\""

	condition:
		filesize < 10KB and all of them
}
